rationale: Acting on either yields a PR with equivalently better generality: Review 1's AlgPoints finding (only k-points vs. functor of points over any R) and Review 2's AffineAlgGroup finding ([Field k] vs. [CommRing k] for finiteType/IsGeometricallyReduced) are both real, diff-grounded issues directly material to generality; other findings address vacuousness/roadmap rather than generality and are comparable in impact.
